name: Asparagus Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop asparagus and set aside tips for use later.
2. Simmer the chopped asparagus and chopped potato in 2 cups of water with 3 tablespoons butter, basil, celery salt, vegetable salt, and pepper to taste until vegetables are tender.
3. Cool the soup mixture.
4. Place the cooled broth and vegetables in a blender and puree, slowly adding the 2 cups of milk.
5. Saute onion, mushrooms, and reserved asparagus tips with a pinch of garlic and parsley in 1 tablespoon butter.
6. Add the sauteed ingredients to the soup mixture and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
7. Grate cheese and add to the soup just before serving, if desired.
